doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission publications, and its claimed UPL exemption contradicts California's established unauthorized practice framework under B&P §6125.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists in the State Bar of California's published rules or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission materials, and the document's core provision—exempting paralegal independent filing assistance from UPL liability under B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review—contradicts California's well-established unauthorized practice framework, which cannot be waived by an administrative protocol of this kind.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar or Legal Services Trust Fund Commission publications, and its claimed UPL exemption contradicts California's established unauthorized practice framework under B&P §6125.
